problem id: 20333a1f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01010000 -> 00000001
  11101111 -> 11100011
  10000010 -> 01000010
  00000101 -> 10100000
  10100000 -> 00000010
  00101101 -> 10100000
  10000100 -> 10000010
  01111100 -> 10000001
  00111010 -> 01000000
  11000110 -> 11000011

query: 10010100
predicted answer: 10000010
